title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 08 2021
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 08 2021
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 08 2021
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 08/09/2021
DCE iron ore futures continued to rise slightly today, the spot quotations tend to be stable in the morning. Some steel mills bought today on theirdemand, and traders sell actively. PBF at Jiangnei region dealt 995yuan/mt, PBF at Shandong port dealt 985yuan/mt.
